scores.correctness_notes: Missing collect_app_status, collect_unit_status, collect_metrics events, and action events (<name>_action). Core lifecycle, relation, storage, secret, pebble, and series upgrade hooks are all present and correct.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — all listed events are real; minor description imprecisions (e.g. leader-settings-changed described as 'notified of leadership changes' rather than 'leader changes settings') but no invented events or APIs
